runTitle: Local QA - AI Assistant Ops Procedure Artifact

environment.backend: Cloud Run AI Engine local source

coveredSurfaces: Root App ops-procedure artifact contract and envelope metadata
AI Assistant artifact intent routing for Slack bash, Alertmanager, runbook, and follow-up threshold edits
Ops procedure generator evidence, secret safety, no-fake-function validator, and threshold patching
Ops procedure artifact renderer card with MD/JSON download actions
Artifact workspace restore and renderer registry support for ops-procedure
Cloud Run monitoring artifact classifier and Advisor routing policy alignment
Cloud Run supervisor shadow baseline for ops-procedure artifact classification
Cloud Run AI Engine type/full test gates
skippedSurfaces: production conversational AI QA for the new ops artifact prompts

expertAssessments.rationale: Ops artifact routing, follow-up edits, renderer support, and safety validators are covered by deterministic regression tests without live provider calls.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Run production conversational QA for script, Alertmanager, and log-runbook prompts after the next release deployment.

expertAssessments.rationale: Generated artifacts preserve manual review, no secret persistence, no auto-execution, and notification-only/read-only safety levels for operational outputs.

completedImprovements.title: Structure operational scripts, alert rules, and runbooks as ops-procedure artifacts
completedImprovements.evidence: failing spec commit b6be9fd58 and implementation commit 508c305f passed targeted/root/ai-engine local gates

notes: Initial failing specs were committed before implementation: ops-procedure intent, generator safety, renderer, workspace registry, and Cloud Run routing tests failed as expected.

Targeted Root App Vitest passed: chat-artifact intent, workspace registry/store, renderer registry, ops-procedure generator, ArtifactCards, useAIChatCore, useQueryExecution, and artifact-intent API route (81/81).
Targeted Cloud Run routing-policy consistency Vitest passed 5/5.
Root App generator/card recheck passed after final bash placeholder hardening (15/15), and generator-only recheck passed 4/4.
npm run lint passed with existing qa-tracker.json max-size info only.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check passed.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run test passed 1086/1086.
No live AI, Slack, Prometheus, Alertmanager, Vercel, or external provider call was executed for this deterministic local QA run.
